areas.name: CLI Core & Orchestration
areas.description: Typer app, subcommands, measurement orchestration, and shared result types.

areas.name: ASN Lookup
areas.description: ASN normalization and Team Cymru bulk lookup.

areas.name: Country Coverage
areas.description: RIPE allocation data driving top-N ASN selection per country.

areas.name: Path Probing & Fusion
areas.description: mtr/traceroute running, Paris traceroute fallback, and multi-source trace fusion.

areas.name: PMTU Detection
areas.description: ICMP PMTU black-hole detection.

areas.name: Connection & Edge Latency
areas.description: TCP connect/TLS handshake latency and edge/TLS reachability checks.

areas.name: Throughput Measurement
areas.description: Bidirectional iperf3 throughput and Cloudflare HTTP speedtest fallback.

areas.name: Cloudflare RUM Overlay
areas.description: Cloudflare Radar real-user-monitoring data fetch and overlay.

areas.name: Globalping Integration
areas.description: Globalping probe inventory, measurement scheduling, and result parsing.

areas.name: Diagnosis & Verdict Engine
areas.description: Signal checks and severity/verdict computation across all probe results.

areas.name: Terminal Display
areas.description: Rich terminal tables, panels, and dual-stack columns.

areas.name: Globe Visualization & Geo
areas.description: Interactive 3D globe visualization and geo/coordinate helpers.

areas.name: DNS Propagation & TUI
areas.description: DNS resolver probing/propagation checks and their interactive TUI.

areas.name: Interactive Path TUI & Service
areas.description: Interactive path-monitoring TUI and its backing service layer.

areas.name: Continuous Monitoring
areas.description: Long-running monitoring/alerting on measurement history.

areas.name: Investigation & Reporting
areas.description: Normalizes results into portable investigation reports and human-readable explanations.

areas.name: Local Packet Capture
areas.description: Local packet capture collection and analysis.

areas.name: iperf3 Server Registry & Discovery
areas.description: Public/self-hosted iperf3 server list fetch, local registry, and community registry service.

areas.name: Target Resolution
areas.description: Resolves and validates probe targets (hostnames, IPs, ASN-derived endpoints).

areas.name: Shared Infrastructure Helpers
areas.description: HTTP retry helper and process-lifecycle helpers shared across interactive workflows.

areas.name: Privacy Invariants & CI Enforcement
areas.description: CI-checked privacy/behavioural invariants and repo hygiene tests.
